name: IndiGo IDFC FIRST Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: UPI, insurance, utilities, fuel, rent, and wallet spends

milestones.label: 5,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spend of Rs 2 Lakh
5,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spend of Rs 5 Lakh
5,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spend of Rs 8 Lakh
5,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spend of Rs 10 Lakh
5,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spend of Rs 12 Lakh

milestoneBenefits: Vouchers of 5,000 IndiGo BluChips at annual spending milestones of Rs 2 Lakh, Rs 5 Lakh, Rs 8 Lakh, Rs 10 Lakh and Rs 12 Lakh (Up to 25,000 BluChips annually)
additionalBenefits: Dual credit card issued on Mastercard and RuPay networks
Welcome benefit of 5,000 IndiGo BluChips voucher plus 1 complimentary IndiGo meal voucher upon fee payment
Activation bonus of 3,000 IndiGo BluChips on spending Rs 1 Lakh or more within the first 90 days
Complimentary Mastercard World/Elite privileges including golf rounds/lessons (4 rounds and 12 lessons annually)
Up to Rs 25,000 reimbursement per year for non-refundable flight and hotel cancellations
RuPay network card enables UPI payments

salaried: Minimum net monthly salary of Rs 1,50,000 for unsecured variant
FD-backed variant available with minimum Fixed Deposit of Rs 1 Lakh
selfEmployed: Minimum annual ITR of Rs 18,00,000 for unsecured variant
FD-backed variant available with minimum Fixed Deposit of Rs 1 Lakh

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
IndiGo co-branded credit card. Earns IndiGo BluChips directly credited to user's 6E Rewards account.
Earns 6 BluChips per Rs 100 spent on IndiGo flights, and 3 BluChips per Rs 100 spent on other retail transactions.
UPI, insurance, utilities, fuel, rent, and wallet spends earn a reduced rate of 0.5 BluChips per Rs 100 spent.
This card does not offer airport lounge access. It offers golf privileges (4 rounds and 12 lessons annually) via Mastercard.
Fee waiver option available by opening a Fixed Deposit of Rs 1 Lakh with the bank.
